style.setting: 한국, 현대 또는 과거, 폐가/산속/도시 어두운 곳

characters.special: 귀신은 서서히 드러나야 함, 주인공은 평범한 사람

forced_style.force_positive: dark atmosphere, horror, silhouette, dramatic lighting
forced_style.force_negative: bright colors, happy, cheerful, cute, moe, (multiple people:1.3), extra person, (deformed face:1.2)

visual.safe_fallback_prompt: dark silhouette, horror atmosphere, fog, dramatic lighting

sd.positive: masterpiece, best quality, (solo:1.2), (dark horror manga illustration:1.2), heavy ink shadows, high contrast monochrome, dark atmosphere, horror, dramatic lighting, eerie, mysterious, (dark background:1.2), cinematic, korean ghost story style
sd.negative: (worst quality:1.4), (low quality:1.4), (multiple people:1.6), (2girls:1.5), (2boys:1.5), (group:1.5), (couple:1.4), extra person, extra face, bright colors, happy, cheerful, nsfw, text, watermark, cute, moe, (child:1.3), (baby face:1.3), (young:1.3), (teenager:1.3), colorful, 3d render, photorealistic, (deformed face:1.3), (extra fingers:1.3), (bad anatomy:1.3), ugly, blurry, (blonde hair:1.2), (white hair:1.2), (silver hair:1.2)

characters.name: 이야기꾼
characters.base_prompt: (solo:1.3), 1boy, (dark silhouette:1.4) of elderly korean man storyteller, (faceless:1.3), no face visible, traditional dark robes, hunched posture

characters.name: 남자 주인공
characters.base_prompt: (solo:1.4), (1boy:1.2), (adult korean man:1.4), (age 30:1.3), (short black hair:1.3), (sharp angular jawline:1.3), (narrow eyes:1.2), (forehead wrinkles:1.1), slight stubble, dark jacket over plain shirt, serious weathered face, tall broad shoulders, (seinen manga style:1.2), only one person

expressions.neutral: calm composed expression, slight tension, furrowed brow
expressions.fear: terrified wide eyes, pale face, (clenched jaw:1.2), cold sweat, visible wrinkles on forehead
expressions.surprise: shocked gasping, open mouth, stepped back, deep frown lines
expressions.confusion: furrowed brows, squinting, hand on chin, crow feet wrinkles
expressions.dread: horrified realization, trembling lips, cold sweat dripping, sunken cheeks
expressions.scared: eyes wide in terror, backing away, hands up defensively, veins on neck
expressions.desperate: screaming, reaching out, tears forming, strained face muscles
expressions.angry: gritted teeth, clenched fists, intense glare, deep frown

poses.standing: standing alert in dark space, tense posture, dim lighting on face
poses.running: (running in fear:1.2), dynamic pose, looking back over shoulder, motion blur on background
poses.hiding: crouching behind furniture, peeking around corner, tense body
poses.frozen: frozen in terror, unable to move, stiff body, single person standing alone
poses.investigating: holding flashlight, leaning forward cautiously, visible face
poses.sitting: sitting on floor, knees to chest, exhausted

characters.name: 여자 주인공
characters.base_prompt: solo, 1girl, korean woman, 20s-30s, long dark hair, casual blouse, slender build, monochrome manga style, no boy, no male

expressions.fear: terrified wide eyes, hands covering mouth, trembling
expressions.surprise: shocked gasping, stepped back, hands up
expressions.confusion: puzzled look, tilted head, biting lip
expressions.dread: horrified realization, tears forming, pale face
expressions.scared: cowering, arms wrapped around self, looking away
expressions.angry: fierce glare, jaw set, standing firm

poses.running: running in fear, hair flowing, looking back
poses.hiding: hiding behind door, peeking through crack
poses.frozen: frozen in terror, hand on wall for support
poses.investigating: holding phone as flashlight, cautious steps

characters.name: 귀신
characters.base_prompt: (solo:1.3), 1girl, korean ghost, long disheveled black hair covering face, (tattered white hanbok:1.4), (white traditional korean dress:1.3), deathly pale skin, supernatural aura, bare feet
characters.style_suffix: eerie, translucent, supernatural horror, dark ink splatters, no modern clothes

expressions.malevolent: twisted unnatural smile, pitch black eyes
expressions.sorrowful: crying dark tears, tragic hollow gaze
expressions.rage: screaming with distorted jaw, hair flying wild

poses.floating: floating in air, long hair flowing upward, feet off ground
poses.standing: standing unnaturally still, head tilted at wrong angle
poses.crawling: crawling on ceiling, limbs bent at unnatural angles
poses.appearing: emerging from shadows, only upper body visible, reaching out

characters.name: 할머니
characters.base_prompt: solo, korean elderly woman, 70s, gray hair in bun, deeply wrinkled face, traditional dark hanbok

poses.sitting: sitting on floor korean style, hands on lap
poses.praying: praying with clasped hands, eyes closed, beads

characters.name: 할아버지
characters.base_prompt: solo, korean elderly man, 70s, thin white hair, weathered wrinkled face, dark traditional clothes

characters.name: 아이
characters.base_prompt: solo, korean child, 8-10 years old, small build, school uniform or simple clothes

sd_model.name: MeinaMix V12
sd_model.why: 2D 일러스트 최적. 공포 장면의 분위기와 캐릭터 표현이 뛰어남.

sfx.category_guide: This is a HORROR video. Available SFX tags: tension (creeping dread), jumpscare (sudden shock), ambient (eerie background), footsteps (approaching steps), door (creaking/slamming), whisper (ghostly whisper), whoosh. Place 2-4 effects per minute at horror peaks.

mood_map.dread: deep shadows, desaturated tones, cold blue lighting, heavy darkness
mood_map.tension: high contrast, dim flickering light, tight framing, claustrophobic
mood_map.shock: sudden bright flash, stark white against black, dramatic contrast
mood_map.eerie: soft fog, moonlight, pale ghostly glow, muted colors

template_sequence: 오늘 들려드릴 이야기는, 어느 평범한 밤에 시작되었습니다.
그리고 그 순간, 뒤에서 차가운 손길이 느껴졌습니다.
다음 날, 사람들은 그 집에서 아무것도 발견하지 못했습니다.
그녀가 그 집에 들어간 이유는, 아직도 아무도 모릅니다.
